item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 12min Already stated by Patreon members as one of the best ones ever. Don't mi
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 12min Already stated by Patreon members as one of the best ones ever. Don't miss out! Cita The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 4h Sunday Roast Ep 7 - 'John Does BFG In Reverse' probably the best racing review we've ever done, some outstanding pointers this week. Tudhope not in the club, Hendo, Outriders how difficult to implement? Racing Post GOOD! Nevison, Lynch, Fitzgerald. Link below, enjoy! 60

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 23min Seriously you don't meet any of the standards of the Barstewards tipping
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 23min Seriously you don't meet any of the standards of the Barstewards tipping team, you're hanging on to your job for grim death and we wouldn't employ you for FREE. Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 3h I assume the banging of this drum was precisely TO GET OTHERS to take notice and join the conversation against these checks?
Now annoyed that people are
Seemingly more important to be the bastion of flying the “moral” flag than actually wanting to effect change x.com/barstewardsthe… 1 186

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 47min Oh looky looky not four years, but FIVE years ago and what did anyone do
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 47min Oh looky looky not four years, but FIVE years ago and what did anyone do? Cita Jess Keys - The Producer @TheProducer24 · 48min Only 5 years ago @BarstewardsThe were saying bookmakers would abuse affordability checks or whatever the hell they’re called now. x.com/barstewardsthe… 229

item.title: JonasLeng: The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jonjo Leng (Barsteward) @JonasLeng · 1h Then you get caught on the same side of the str
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jonjo Leng (Barsteward) @JonasLeng · 1h Then you get caught on the same side of the street as someone who doesn’t fancy dog racing and every fuckers granny is taking pot shots Been collectively called allsorts for giving a shit about this sport Half of us can’t get a bet on anyway Might as well have been watching HBO Cita The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 6h Four years we've been banging on about 'affordability'. Why has everyone suddenly joined the party? Scared at losing your livelihood? A lot of full time bettors already have, you didn't care then, we know why you do now, poop/fan etc. Wait till they wheel out open banking next! 1 4 444

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 1h There has never been a legal challenge because they have never wanted one.
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 1h There has never been a legal challenge because they have never wanted one. Cita James Noyes @jranoyes · 1h En respuesta a @geoffbanksbet I admit I’m surprised that there hasn’t already been a legal challenge by an operator. I guess the question is whether there is a strong enough basis for such a challenge to be made. 1 3 644

item.title: giorgiking10: Daniel Barber reposteó Giorgi Kinkladze @giorgiking10 · 5h En respuesta a @petercrouch Appreciated 20 82 1 mil 23 mil
item.description: Daniel Barber reposteó Giorgi Kinkladze @giorgiking10 · 5h En respuesta a @petercrouch Appreciated 20 82 1 mil 23 mil

The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó Jess Keys - The Producer @TheProducer24 · 3h En respuesta a @AntepostValue y @BarstewardsThe You clearly haven’t read this and the shit myself and Lee have been put through this last year for trying to help the sport out. Cita The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 21 feb. Artículo The Unlikely Alliance - A story of betrayal and the reemergence of a stalker. After 14 months of holding my tongue, while many people whom I used to regard as friends put out half-truths and lies. I have decided to release the full story of how I came to work with Matt Zarb... 2 10 2 mil
